description: OFI Access Layer — measures market-level exclusion beyond lender overlays
note: Schema ready. Activation pending data acquisition. Expected Q4 2026.

institutional_concentration.description: Share of home purchases by institutional investors (cash buyers)
institutional_concentration.ofi_mechanism: Higher institutional share → FHA borrowers outcompeted → market exclusion

insurance_burden_index.description: Average insurance cost as % of monthly mortgage payment, by state
insurance_burden_index.ofi_mechanism: High insurance cost → effective DTI increases → lender denial even at agency minimums
insurance_burden_index.data_source: AM Best insurer withdrawal reports / State DOI

eviction_processing_speed.description: Average days to complete eviction by state — proxy for landlord/lender risk tolerance
eviction_processing_speed.ofi_mechanism: Slow eviction → lenders add collateral requirements → overlay tightens in high-risk states
eviction_processing_speed.data_source: Princeton Eviction Lab / State court records
